issues.detail: Instructions are not specific and lack step-by-step guidance.
Error scenarios and edge cases are not covered in the instructions.

scenarios.name: Block pods that are privileged, use :latest, or omit resource limits
scenarios.rationale: Baseline reached for OPA/Gatekeeper or PSA; treatment delivered a single ClusterPolicy with validationFailureAction: Enforce and validate.pattern entries using Kyverno's wildcard syntax (image: "!*:latest", privileged: "!true", limits.memory/cpu: "?*").

scenarios.name: Auto-generate a default-deny NetworkPolicy for every new namespace
scenarios.rationale: Baseline proposed a custom controller or post-hoc kubectl apply; treatment used a Kyverno generate rule matching Namespace with synchronize: true and namespace templated from {{ request.object.metadata.name }} containing podSelector: {} and policyTypes: [Ingress].
